modeReason: Recovery controller confirms normal mode. All 6 health dimensions green: PR queue empty, main CI green (last 10 runs all success), agents active (coder-agent branches from today), 0 merge conflicts, swarm state fresh, roadmap progressing. Risk score steady at 10. No remediation required.

prBlastRadius.note: 3 open PRs with total blast radius 547 lines. #901 (OWASP audit, 374 lines) is largest. No single PR exceeds 500-line HIGH threshold.

testFailureRate.note: 10% failure rate (2/20 runs). Both failures on v2.7.0 release branch, not main. Main CI green. Below 20% ELEVATED threshold.

governanceDenialRate.note: No telemetry events or analytics data available. No denials observed. Security issues #618, #648, #640, #639 remain open but no active denials.

mergeConflictRate.note: 1/3 open PRs conflicting (33%). #890 has merge conflict. Above 25% ELEVATED threshold but below 50% HIGH threshold.

agentChurnRate.flag: ELEVATED — 40 PRs in 24h indicates high agent activity; no wasted work (0 closed-without-merge)

deltaFromPrior.cause: PR queue grew 0→3 with 547 total lines. 1 merge conflict on #890. Agent churn high (40 PRs/24h). CI failure rate low at 10%. Risk increased but remains within NORMAL band.

completedPhases.name: Reference Monitor Hardening
completedPhases.note: All 7 roadmap items complete. Default-deny shipped 2026-03-24. PAUSE/ROLLBACK enforced 2026-03-18. Performance benchmark gate operational. Commit scope guard (#22) shipped v2.5.0.

activePhases.name: Kernel Evolution Sprint

KE-2.note: ActionContext design — in-progress, priority:high, last updated 2026-03-25

activePhases.note: KE-1 and KE-3 complete. KE-2 is the critical path for v3.0. KE-4 in review. Sprint at 37% (up from 20%).

activePhases.name: v3.0 Major Release
activePhases.blockedBy: KE-2 (ActionContext) must ship before v3.0 item 1 can be checked

plannedPhases.name: Pull-Based Runner
plannedPhases.note: Depends on v3.0 release + Cloud Phase 2A

milestones.name: Reference Monitor Hardening
milestones.significance: Phase 6 completion transforms AgentGuard from advisory interception to mandatory execution control. Default-deny is now the baseline. This unlocks KE-2 and v3.0 work.

milestones.name: Governance Event Envelope
milestones.significance: All telemetry now follows versioned schema. Cloud ingestion consumes envelopes directly with zero special cases.

backlogExpansionRate.note: Backlog expanding at 1.11x rate (146 created vs 131 closed in 7 days). Most created issues are recurring agent reports (sprint plans, observability, governance reports) that get auto-closed. Net work issue expansion is modest. 97 total open issues, 89 non-report work items.

stallDetection.note: No phases have exceeded the 14-day stall threshold. Phase 6 and KE-3 both completed in the last 24 hours. KE-2 (#856) is actively in-progress (updated today). Phase 9 (#331) updated 2026-03-25.

prQueue.note: 3 open PRs (#890, #901, #902). Total blast radius 547 lines. #890 has merge conflict. Manageable queue.

ciOnMain.note: Main branch CI green. 18/20 recent runs succeeded. 2 failures on v2.7.0 release branch only.

agentLiveness.note: 40 PRs opened in last 24h. High agent activity. 0 closed-without-merge indicates productive output.

mergeConflicts.note: #890 (EM cycle report) has merge conflict. 33% conflict rate (1/3 open PRs).

swarmStateFreshness.note: Prior update: 2026-03-25T14:10Z (recovery-controller-agent). This update: 2026-03-25T16:05Z (risk-escalation-agent). Cadence within target.

roadmapProgress.note: KE Sprint at 37%. Critical path: KE-2 → v3.0. No new phase completions since last assessment.

recoveryActions.description: Updated swarm-state.json: Issues #647 and #636 CLOSED, risk score 22→8, escalation ELEVATED→NORMAL.
Risk score 13→23 (NORMAL→ELEVATED). PR queue grew 3→8. #822 CONFLICTING.
Phase 6 COMPLETED (7/7). KE-3 COMPLETED (5/5). KE Sprint 20%→37%. PR queue 8→0. Risk 23→10 (ELEVATED→NORMAL). Mode recommendation: normal.

All 6 health dimensions green. Mode confirmed: normal. No remediation required. PR queue 0, CI green (10/10 success), agents active (9 branches today), 0 conflicts, swarm state fresh, roadmap on-track.
Risk score 10→20 (NORMAL). PR queue 0→3 (547 lines). 1 conflict on #890 (33% rate). Agent churn 40 PRs/24h. CI 90% pass (2 failures on v2.7.0 only). No gating actions. Mode recommendation: normal.

blockers.description: KE-2 (ActionContext, #856) is the critical path blocker for v3.0. Currently in-progress with 0/4 checkboxes. v3.0 cannot ship until KE-2 completes.
blockers.recommendation: Prioritize KE-2 implementation. This is the single most important work item for the project.

blockers.description: 4 security issues without assigned PRs: #618 (credential write bypass), #648 (read-only blocking), #640 (path manipulation), #639 (credential stripping).
blockers.recommendation: Assign implementation agent to highest-severity item (#618).

blockers.description: Issue #868: Agent PRs merging with failing CI. Governance enforcement gap on main branch. Priority:critical.
blockers.recommendation: Address #868 and #830 (required status checks) together — both relate to CI enforcement on main.

systemSummary.progressSinceLastRun: Risk score 10→20 (still NORMAL). PR queue grew 0→3 (547 lines total). 1 merge conflict on #890. Agent churn high at 40 PRs/24h but 0 wasted. CI green on main. Conflict rate at 33% is the primary driver of score increase.

modeChangeConditions.toNormal: CURRENT STATE — risk score 20, 3 open PRs, 1 conflict, main CI green.
modeChangeConditions.toElevated: Risk score exceeds 20, or PR queue grows above 5, or conflict rate exceeds 50%.
modeChangeConditions.toCritical: Main CI failure rate >30%, 2+ unresolved critical issues, or merge conflict cascade (3+ PRs).
